name: DWS - FOS Performance Dashboard
subtitle: Field Operations Support · PT. Telekomunikasi Indonesia
description: A centralized SLA compliance monitoring dashboard for DWS Field Operations Support (FOS). Tracks KPI metrics across 4 Areas, 12 Regionals, and 47 Branches nationwide, covering entities including TTI, FFG, TTR FFG, PS/RE, and FFG Gaul. Data is processed monthly from operational files and published to this dashboard.

fields.label: Entities
fields.value: TTI, FFG, TTR FFG, PS/RE, FFG Gaul
